case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. LINCOLN GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR APR-16-2004 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LINCOLN GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $120.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,120.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

MOTION NOTICE TO SET ASIDE SUMMARY JUDGMENT,DISCHARGE FORFEITURE AND EXONERATE BAIL, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY DEFENDANT LINCOLN GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY HEARING SET FOR FEB-13-2004 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301

STIPULATION TO CONTINUE HEARING ON MOTION TO SET ASIDE SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT LINCOLN GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY

REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE FILED BY DEFENDANT LINCOLN GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY
MINI-MINUTES FOR APR-09-2004 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT LINCOLN GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE SUMMARY JUDGMENT, DISCHARGE FORFEITURE AND EXONERATE BAIL: GRANTED; SUMMARY JUDGMENT WAS IMPROPERLY ENTERED. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: JAMES L. WARREN REPORTER: ROBERT BALIAN, CSR #5220
OPPOSITION MOTION BY REAL PARTIES IN INTEREST TO SET ASIDE SUMMARY JUDGMENT, DISCHARGE FORFEITURE AND EXONERATE BAIL FILED BY PLTF

LAW AND MOTION 301, MOTION TO SET ASIDE SUMMARY JUDGMENT,DISCHARGE FORFEITURE AND EXONERATE BAIL CONTINUED FROM FEB-13-2004 TO LAW AND MOTION AT APR-09-2004, 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 301. DEFENDANT LINCOLN GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION IS CONTINUED. NO FURTHER BRIEFING IS REQUIRED. JUDGE: JAMES L. WARREN REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON, CSR #1558

LAW AND MOTION 301, MOTION TO SET ASIDE SUMMARY JUDGMENT, DISCHARGE FORFEITURE AND EXONERATE BAIL CONTINUED FROM APR-09-2004 TO LAW AND MOTION AT APR-16-2004, 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 301. STIPULATION TO CONTINUE MOTION PRESENTED TO THE COURT. DEFENDANT LINCOLN GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION IS CONTINUED. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: JAMES L. WARREN REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON, CSR #1558
